query: Apple AAPL total annual revenue FY2024 macrotrends
answer: Apple's total annual revenue for FY2024 was $391.035 billion, a 2.02% increase from 2023. In 2025, revenue rose to $416.161 billion, marking a 6.43% increase from 2024.

results.title: Apple Net Income 2012-2025 | AAPL | MacroTrends
results.snippet: ## Apple Net Income 2012-2025 | AAPL. Apple annual/quarterly net income history and growth rate from 2012 to 2025. Net income can be defined as company's net profit or loss after all revenues, income items, and expenses have been accounted for. * Apple net income for the quarter ending December 31, 2025 was **$42.097B**, a **15.87% increase** year-over-year. * Apple net income for the twelve months ending December 31, 2025 was **$117.777B**, a **22.49% increase** year-over-year. * Apple annual net income for 2025 was **$112.01B**, a **19.5% increase** from 2024. * Apple annual net income for 2024 was **$93.736B**, a **3.36% decline** from 2023. * Apple annual net income for 2023 was **$96.995B**, a **2.81% decline** from 2022. | Apple Annual Net Income (Millions of US $) |. | Apple Quarterly Net Income (Millions of US $) |. results.title: Apple Common Stock Net 2012-2025 | AAPL - Macrotrends

results.snippet: ## Apple Comprehensive Income 2012-2025 | AAPL. Apple comprehensive income from 2012 to 2025. results.title: Apple Operating Expenses 2012-2025 | AAPL | MacroTrends
results.snippet: ## Apple Operating Expenses 2012-2025 | AAPL.
